ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "round" INTEGER /* The round number in which the match occurred */,
  "fixture" INTEGER /* The fixture number */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the home team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the home team's coach */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the home team */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the away team */,
  "opponent_team_name" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "opponent_coach" TEXT /* Name of the away team's coach */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the away team */,
  "differential" INTEGER /* Score differential between the teams */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Win status for the home team */,
  "draw" INTEGER /* Draw status for the match */,
  "loss" INTEGER /* Loss status for the home team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the home team in the standings */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points achieved by the home team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the home team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the home team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the home team */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the home team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the home team */,
  "percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage win rate for the home team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the match was played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee overseeing the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES league_standings ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "percentage" INTEGER /* Win percentage for the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the league */,
  "home_venue" TEXT /* Primary venue for the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team's standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position in the league */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "percentage" INTEGER /* Win percentage for the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals scored and conceded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
